name_en: 【Includes Full Counter Green Packaging】!!️GG Marmont Series Card Holder, Gucci continuously updates colors, adding more refined tones. In new colors and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This card holder is crafted from Elephant Grey leather.
